ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Duke of Atri; Prince of Teramo, Acquaviva and Bitonto; Count of Giulianova and Gioia.
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Giosia was the son of Anna Concublet and nephew of Andrea Concublet, founder of the Investiganti Academy. For further information on the Acquaviva family see Baldasarre Storace, Istoria della Famiglia Acquaviva Reale D`Aragona, Roma, 1738; Angelo Antonio Cosmo De` Bartolomei, Sulla Nobilissima Famiglia Italiana Degli Acquaviva, Ascoli, 1840.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
